sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96860" key="stixelegei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στῐχελεγεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n96860.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">elegiac verse</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Heph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.211</biblScope> </bibl> C.</sense> </entryFree>
